description: Baselines for RQ1 self-retrieval accuracy: full model (range + cosine − α×avoid), cosine-only (α = 0), and range-only + random ranking (null). Uses the same random query pool definition and sampling rule as run_rq1_experiment.py.

model_descriptions.null_random: Range filter only, then a completely random ranking over the candidate set (null model).
model_descriptions.cosine_only: Range filter + cosine similarity only (α = 0.0; avoid list ignored in scoring).
